summary: Iteration 61: CEO Dashboard + Promotional Pricing + Health Check + Marketing Videos - ALL TESTS PASSED. Complete testing of CEO Dashboard login flow, tabs navigation, user search, health endpoints, promo-status API, and pricing page with live counters.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/heartbeat returns {alive:true, ts:...}
BACKEND: GET /api/health returns {status:healthy, database:healthy}
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/promo-status returns {basic_stock_remaining:50, promo_200_remaining:200, discount_pct:20}
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/login with ceo@manoprotect.com/19862210Des returns user with role:admin
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/stats returns dashboard stats (users, subscriptions, orders, refunds, promo, revenue, messages)
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/users?search=ceo returns CEO user in results
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/subscriptions returns paginated subscriptions list
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/orders returns paginated orders list
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/refunds returns paginated refunds list
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/messages returns paginated messages list
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/activity returns recent activity list
BACKEND: Unauthenticated requests to /api/ceo/stats return 401/403
FRONTEND: Landing page loads with hero section and navigation
FRONTEND: Marketing videos section has 4 video cards with data-testid='video-card-{0-3}'
FRONTEND: Login page accepts email/password and redirects to /dashboard
FRONTEND: /ceo route loads CEO Dashboard after authentication
FRONTEND: CEO Dashboard shows 'Backend LIVE' and 'Frontend LIVE' indicators
FRONTEND: CEO Dashboard displays 6 stat cards (Usuarios, Suscripciones, MRR, Pedidos, Reembolsos, Mensajes)
FRONTEND: CEO Dashboard shows Stock Sentinel X Basic GRATIS (50/50) card
FRONTEND: CEO Dashboard shows Promo 200 usuarios (-20%) (200/200) card
FRONTEND: CEO Dashboard Usuarios tab shows table with user data
FRONTEND: CEO Dashboard Suscripciones tab shows table
FRONTEND: CEO Dashboard Pedidos tab shows table
FRONTEND: CEO Dashboard Reembolsos tab shows table
FRONTEND: CEO Dashboard Mensajes tab shows table with 1 message
FRONTEND: CEO Dashboard user search for 'ceo' returns ceo@manoprotect.com user
FRONTEND: /plans page shows promo live counters (50/50 basic, 200/200 plazas)
FRONTEND: /plans page shows Plan Mensual 9,99€/mes and Plan Anual 99,99€/año
context_for_next_testing_agent: CEO Dashboard fully functional. Key routes: /ceo requires authentication with admin role. Health endpoints: /api/heartbeat (fast ping), /api/health (DB status). Promo status: /api/ceo/promo-status is PUBLIC (no auth). All other /api/ceo/* endpoints require admin auth via session cookies. Frontend uses session-based auth with cookies (not JWT). HealthCheckMonitor component polls /api/heartbeat every 5 seconds.

health_check.frontend_indicator: Backend LIVE / Frontend LIVE shown in header

mocked_apis.note: All data comes from real MongoDB queries
